hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: Build a **prefix product** array and a **suffix product** array. `answer[i] = prefix[i-1] * suffix[i+1]`.

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: You can do it in O(1) extra space (excluding output): first pass fills `answer` with prefix products, second pass multiplies in suffix products using a running variable.
